name: Queen Elizabeth Cake 3
recipeInstructions:
6 tbsp Brown sugar
3 tbsp Butter
4 tbsp Canned milk
1 cup Coconut
1 pinch Salt
Cook dates, water and vanilla to a soft mass. Cream margarine, sugar and egg. Add dry ingredients to the creamed mixture. Add date mixture. Pour into a 9 x 9 greased pan and bake at 325°F for 35 minutes. While baking, put all topping ingredients in a small pot and bring to a boil. Boil for 3 minutes. When cake is baked, remove from oven, spread topping on it and place under the broiler to brown. Watch carefully, as it could burn.
Note: Helen Peagram, F-Cooking
